Common.categoriesDesc: Choose a category to explore its tools
Common.allToolsDesc: Quick access to all available tools
Common.selectTool: Select a tool above to get started
Common.comingSoon: This tool will be available soon.
Common.description: Multi-tool suite that is {free} and {private}. PDF, images, SEO, text, generators and calculators — all directly in your browser.

pdf.label: PDF & Documents
pdf.description: Compress, merge, convert and protect PDFs

text-tools.label: Text Tools
text-tools.description: Word counter, case converter and text utilities

generators.label: Generators
generators.description: QR codes, passwords, hashes and colors

video.label: Video
video.description: Trim, compress, convert and edit videos

pdf-convert.label: PDF to Images
pdf-convert.description: Convert PDFs to JPG or PNG

img-convert.label: Universal Converter
img-convert.description: Convert to WebP, AVIF, JPG, PNG

heic-to-jpg.label: HEIC to JPG
heic-to-jpg.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG

json-csv.label: JSON / CSV
json-csv.description: Convert and format JSON and CSV

text-diff-checker.label: Text Diff Checker
text-diff-checker.description: Compare two texts and see differences

qr-code-generator.label: QR Code Generator
qr-code-generator.description: Generate QR codes for URLs and text

color-picker.label: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Color picker with HEX, RGB, HSL

age-calculator.label: Age Calculator
age-calculator.description: Calculate your exact age in days

video-convert.label: Convert Video
video-convert.description: Convert between MP4, WebM, AVI, MKV, GIF

video-add-audio.label: Add Audio
video-add-audio.description: Add music or voiceover to a video

video-extract-audio.label: Extract Audio
video-extract-audio.description: Extract audio track to MP3, WAV, AAC

video-remove-audio.label: Remove Audio
video-remove-audio.description: Remove audio track from a video
